method: hosted logical dump (supabase db dump via session pooler aws-1, ports 5432) -> isolated local stack restore (public schema dropped first)
limitations: Free tier has no hosted PITR — logical dump/restore is the strongest supported method

supabase db dump restored schema + RLS-enabled state but ZERO policies (restored DB is default-deny — safe direction, but incomplete). Documented recovery procedure: apply migrations 000100-001000 FIRST (recreates all policies/functions/grants), then restore the --data-only dump
direct db host is IPv6-only; use the aws-1 session pooler (Management API is the authoritative source for the pooler host)
